arts.ttl: Juventus Furious Over Kolo Muani Deal Snag, Working with PSG to Resolve Issue
arts.sum: The Randal Kolo Muani transfer saga took an unexpected turn yesterday, as bureaucratic issues emerged to complicate the deal between Juventus and Paris Saint-Germain. While the Italian club had reportedly reached a full agreement with all parties involved, PSG realized they had exhausted their available loan slots, bringing the transfer to a standstill. arts.ttl: Why Liverpool, Man Utd’s €70M-Rated Linked Talent Chose to Join PSG
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain made a major move in the January transfer window by securing former Napoli winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia. This signing is expected to have a significant impact on the market.
